summary: Learn Page Cleanup Testing - All 16 features tested and PASSED. Page loads cleanly with no boilerplate sections. Topic hub modals work with tabs (Overview/Videos/Products/Services). Personalized 'Learn for My Dog' section shows for logged-in users.

issues: YouTube video thumbnails show 404 errors - EXPECTED behavior per requirements (YouTube API quota exceeded, using static fallback videos)

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent missing aria-describedby attribute - minor accessibility warning, not blocking
Console shows '[LearnPage] Loaded undefined products via pillar resolver' - products count logging could be improved
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learn page cleanup verified. All boilerplate sections removed. Clean flow: Hero/Ask bar → 12 Topic Boxes → How Can We Help → Learn for My Dog (personalized) → Guided Learning Paths → Products That Help → Services That Help → Near Me → Curated Bundles → ServiceCatalog → Footer

learn_page_loads.details: Learn page at /learn loads without errors, no console errors

12_topic_boxes.details: All 12 topic boxes visible: Puppy Basics, Breed Guides, Food & Feeding, Grooming, Behavior, Training Basics, Travel with Dogs, Senior Dog Care, Health Basics, Rescue/Indie Care, Seasonal Care, New Pet Parent Guide

topic_modal_opens.details: Clicking topic box (Puppy Basics) opens LearnTopicModal with header, image, and tabs

modal_overview_tab.details: Overview tab shows 6 expandable subtopics with Mira's Tips (First week at home, Toilet training, etc.)

modal_videos_tab.details: Videos tab shows 3 video cards with titles and durations (curated fallback due to YouTube API quota)

modal_products_tab.details: Products tab shows 4 product cards with prices and 'Continue to Shop' button

modal_services_tab.details: Services tab shows 3 service options with 'Ask Concierge' badge on unavailable services

send_to_concierge_button.details: Button triggers Universal Service Command - ticket created successfully (TKT-9A846F33, REQ-20260311-1DD7)

ask_bar_functional.details: Typing query and pressing Enter opens Mira AI chat panel with pre-filled query

how_can_we_help_section.details: 3 action buckets visible: Products & Routines, Life Stage & Care, Support & Services

guided_learning_paths.details: 6 paths visible: New Puppy Path, New Adoption Path, Senior Dog Path, Travel Path, Grooming Path, Behavior Path

products_that_help.details: Section visible with category buttons (All Products, Training Tools, Grooming, Feeding, Travel, Comfort)

services_that_help.details: Section visible with 4 service cards (Training Consult, Grooming Consult, Behavior Support, Puppy Guidance)

near_me_section.details: Section renders with location picker and category buttons (Dog Trainers, Groomers, Pet Stores, Veterinarians, Behaviorists)

curated_bundles.details: Section renders with 2 bundles (Puppy Starter Kit ₹2,499, Training Essentials Bundle ₹3,999)

care_page_regression.details: Care page at /care loads successfully with 14,690 characters of content, 23 bundles loaded

learn_for_my_dog_personalized.details: Logged-in user sees 'Learn for Mojo' section with breed-specific tips (Training tips for Indie, Grooming guide, Nutrition basics, Exercise recommendations)

mocked_apis.youtube_videos: Using static curated fallback videos due to YouTube API quota exceeded - NOT a bug
